name: @lacymorrow/ship
description: Interactive release CLI — version bump, git tag, GitHub release, npm publish, Homebrew update

scripts.build: bun build bin/ship.ts --outfile dist/ship.js --target node && node -e "const f=require('fs');const c=f.readFileSync('dist/ship.js','utf8');f.writeFileSync('dist/ship.js',c.replace('#!/usr/bin/env bun','#!/usr/bin/env node').replace('// @bun\n',''))"

author: Lacy Morrow <lacy@lacymorrow.com>
